channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-11 to 2026-07-17
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 5 INTERESTING, 2 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Sat 2026-07-11: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 7.2 sec, wind 4 kt NW, water 73°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 7 kt NE, water 74°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (NE). Mon 2026-07-13: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 2 kt NW, water 74°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 6 kt W, water 72°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 9 kt W, water 72°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (4.8 sec). Thu 2026-07-16: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 73°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 7 kt W, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 5 INTERESTING, 2 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Sat 2026-07-11: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 7.2 sec, wind 4 kt NW, water 73°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 7 kt NE, water 74°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft); period too short (5.0 sec); wind direction off (NE).
  • Mon 2026-07-13: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 2 kt NW, water 74°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 6 kt W, water 72°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 9 kt W, water 72°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (4.8 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-16: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 73°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 7 kt W, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
